name: Jello and Mandarin Oranges
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the mandarin oranges.
2. Mix together the Cool Whip and cottage cheese until combined.
3. Sprinkle the orange Jell-O over the mixture of Cool Whip and cottage cheese.
4. Mix well to ensure even distribution of the Jell-O.
5. Fold in the drained mandarin oranges.
6. Chill the mixture thoroughly before serving.
